ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "series" TEXT /* Series of the publication (e.g., SP, NISTIR) */,
  "number" TEXT /* Number of the publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the publication (e.g., Final, Draft) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the publication */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for the publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier for the publication */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the publication */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the publication */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the publication */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last modification */,
  "version" TEXT /* Current version number of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES publication_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_series FOREIGN KEY ("series") REFERENCES publication_series ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication series */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the publication series */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the publication series */,
  "series_type" TEXT /* Type of the publication series (e.g., Technical, Policy) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the series is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the series */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the series was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the publication status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the publication status */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the status is the final state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or department affiliation */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the author */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the author record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the author record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_authors" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the author in the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id", "author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or department affiliation */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the reviewer */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the reviewer record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the reviewer record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_reviewers" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was completed */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Reviewer's feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id", "reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version history entry */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the publication */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date changes were made */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_history_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_history_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_history_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download event */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date the publication was downloaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who downloaded the publication */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the publication has been downloaded */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who downloaded the publication */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user who downloaded the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_downloads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_downloads_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., author, reviewer, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or department affiliation */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the user */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the user record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the role is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date the revision was made */,
  "revision_description" TEXT /* Description of the revision */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the revision */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_revisions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_revisions_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_revisions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revision_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision history entry */,
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* ID of the revision */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this revision */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date changes were made */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revision_history_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revision_history_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revision_history_revision_id FOREIGN KEY ("revision_id") REFERENCES publication_revisions ("revision_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was made */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_updates_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_updates_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_updates_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "update_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update history entry */,
  "update_id" INTEGER /* ID of the update */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this update */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date changes were made */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_update_history_update_id FOREIGN KEY ("update_id") REFERENCES publication_updates ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_update_history_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_update_history_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the publication */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the publication for this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created this version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_versions_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
